markets.no_sub_title: Ioannis Xilas
markets.rules_primary: If Ioannis Xilas wins the Xilas vs Mrva professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Hersonissos Round Of 16 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Xilas vs Mrva professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Hersonissos Round Of 16 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
